519 PAIN_THRPY_DSCHRG_CD PAIN_THRPY_DSCHRG_CD Pain interference with therapy activities (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column document, at the time of discharge, how often, in the past five days, pain has interfered with therapy. 0 = Does not apply - I have not received rehabilitation therapy in the past 5 days
1 = Rarely
